name: devops
description: 9 DevOps and SRE skills that audit, remediate, and test — plain-language needs assessment, CI/CD pipelines, Terraform/OpenTofu IaC, Docker containers, Kubernetes manifests, observability, release readiness, DevSecOps supply chain, and SRE reliability. Supports three operating modes: static-file audit (default, no tools required), live-access audit (uses kubectl, terraform, aws, gcloud, docker when available), and apply mode (opt-in --apply flag, per-change confirmation). Runtime testing — load tests, chaos experiments, and synthetic alert firing — is supported where each skill can run it safely with blast-radius guardrails. Every finding is evidence-backed with file:line references.
